examples: First and foremost he is a logician.
There is no loophole, he is as perfect a logician as any Aristotle.
As the founder of pragmatism, firstly and mostly Peirce was a logician.
With this question in hand, we can seek help from a 14th century logician and Franciscan friar William of Ockham.
But Mr Barak, ever the logician, maintains that irreducible interest and not ephemeral emotion will determine the two sides' bottom lines.
